changelog: Live stream self-healing — Sportsnet East / TSN HD / etc. no longer require backing out and re-entering a channel when they freeze. Recovery now does a full source rebuild (stop → clearMediaItems → setMediaItem → prepare → seek-to-live → play) instead of just re-prepare(). Catches the wedged-HLS case where prepare() alone is a no-op.

Live stream STATE_ENDED is now treated as a failure (it's a contradiction in terms for a live feed) and triggers recovery instead of being ignored. Was the root cause of the 'froze, had to exit channel' reports.
Recovery stall threshold tightened from 5 s → 4 s for live, so the picture comes back ~1 s sooner on a CDN edge hiccup.
MediaItem snapshot in the recovery loop is now refreshed when the user zaps channels (CH+/-), so post-zap recovery uses the correct new URL.
Server: live score display fixed for games with a team at 0 (was showing blank where TheSportsDB sends null). Refresh cadences tightened: schedule 15→5 min, broadcasts 30→15 min, PPV 6h→1h.
